channel.title: Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board - Public Notices
channel.description: Public notices for Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board meetings and proceedings

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
SOUTH FLORIDA WATER MANAGEMENT DISTRICT 3301 Gun Club Road, West Palm Beach, FL 33406 RegPermitting@sfwmd
--- Full Notice Text --- SOUTH FLORIDA WATER MANAGEMENT DISTRICT 3301 Gun Club Road, West Palm Beach, FL 33406 RegPermitting@sfwmd.gov NOTICE OF RECEIPT OF APPLICATION
Notice is hereby given, pursuant to Chapter 373, Florida Statutes, that the application(s) for permit described below has been received for project(s) in Palm Beach County. The application(s) and future additional application documents can be obtained by any of the following methods: 1) Accessing the District's website (www.sfwmd.gov) and clicking on Application/Permit Search on the RegPermitting page; 2) Submitting a written request to the South Florida Water Management District, Attn: Regulation Division, 3301 Gun Club Road, West Palm Beach, FL 33406; or 3) Submitting an electronic request at regpermitting@sfwmd.gov.
Weslyn Park, Tri Pointe Homes Holdings Inc, 200 Colonial Center Pkwy, Ste 140, Lake Mary, FL 32746, has submitted Application 260212-61582 for a New Water Use Permit to dewater on undeveloped lands. The water will be withdrawn from the water table aquifer and the project is located in Osceola and Orange Counties.
7-Eleven Store No. 42831, 7-Eleven Inc, PO Box 711 Loc 148, Dallas, TX 75211, has submitted Application 260216-61675 for a New Water Use Permit to dewater on undeveloped lands. The water will be withdrawn from the surficial aquifer and the project is located in Osceola County.
Boggy Creek Road Widening, Osceola County Board of County Commissioners, 1 Courthouse Sq, Ste 4700, Kissimmee, FL 34741, has submitted Application 260216-61665 for a New Water Use Permit to dewater on undeveloped lands. The water will be withdrawn from the water table aquifer and the project is located in Osceola County.
Cross Prairie Parkway North Roadway, GAI Consultants Inc, 618 E South, Ste 700, Orlando, FL 32801, has submitted Application 260224-61908 for a New Water Use Permit to dewater on undeveloped lands. The water will be withdrawn from the water table aquifer and the project is located in Osceola County.
Duke Energy - Turnpike PWS, Duck Energy Business Services LLC, 525 S Tryon St, Charlotte, NC 28208, has submitted Application 260224-61907 for a New Water Use Permit to irrigate public water supply lands. The water will be withdrawn from the Upper Floridan aquifer and the project is located in Osceola County.
Hibiscus on the Creek, Kissimmee Leased Housing Associates V LLC, 4835 Lyndon B Johnson HWY, Ste 1000, Dallas, TX 75244, has submitted Application 260305-62200 for a New Water Use Permit to dewater on undeveloped lands. The water will be withdrawn from the water table aquifer and the project is located in Osceola County. March 19, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15757-NO Oxygen Cylinder Rental and Refill Services
Meeting: Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 12:00 PM
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15757-NO Oxygen Cylinder Rental and Refill Services. There will be No Pre-Bid Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Thursday, March 26, 2026, at 2:00 PM, local time. Due Date: Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM, local time. Contact: Nancy Ortiz at 407-742-0940 2) PS-26-15854-DG Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is seeking proposals from professional engineering firms to provide Construction Engineering and Inspection (CEI) Services for the Cross Prairie Parkway Design Build project from Nolte Road to C-31 Canal. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. The Proposer (Prime Consultant) must be Florida Department of Transportation (FDOT) prequalified in the following Major Work Groups: 10.1 Roadway Construction Engineering Inspection, 10.5.1 Major Bridge CEI Concrete, and Minor Work Group 10.3 Construction Materials Inspection. There will be a VIRTUAL NON-MANDATORY PRE-PROPOSAL CONFERENCE held on Wednesday, March 25 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time. Dial in at 407-906-2344, and when prompted, enter the following conference code: 227 063 259#.Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 12:00 PM Local Time. DUE DATE: Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Don Gaskins (407) 742-0931. The release date for this solicitation is March 15, 2026. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. March 19, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1)RFP-26-15818-RR Third-Party Programming, Governance & Operations Con...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1)RFP-26-15818-RR Third-Party Programming, Governance & Operations Consulting Services. There is no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for questions is Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 12:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, March 31, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Robert Rosenstein (407) 742-0900. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. March 5, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) PS-26-15716-PC Design Services for Canoe Creek Road Widening Project
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) PS-26-15716-PC Design Services for Canoe Creek Road Widening Project. There will be a VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference via the Microsoft TEAMs application on Tuesday, March 3, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time. Dial in at 407-906-2344, and when prompted enter the conference code: 518 149 335#. Deadline for questions is Wednesday, March 11, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) 742-0932. 2) PS-26-15784-LA - Continuing Planning, Engineering, Architecture, Construction Engineering Inspection and Design Services. Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is seeking proposals from qualified firms to provide Engineering, Construction Engineering and Inspection (CEI) services, Planning, Landscape Architecture, Architecture and Design, and economic consulting and/or advisory services on a Task Authorization basis. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. There will be no pre-proposal conference. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, March 4, 2026, at 5:00 PM Local Time. DUE DATE: Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Luis Aviles (407) 742-0937. The release date for this solicitation is February 22, 2026. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. February 26, 2026

--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1)RFP-26-15780-RR Third-Party Theatre Planning, Technical Design & Owner Advisory Services. There is no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for questions is Wednesday, February 25, 2026, at 12:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, March 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Robert Rosenstein (407) 742-0900. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. February 19, 2026
